title: Iran Sneaking Out Tankers Via Hormuz as Trump Amps Up Threats
title_cn: 特朗普加大威胁力度，伊朗通过霍尔木兹海峡偷偷撤离油轮
summary: Iran has been sneaking oil tankers through the Strait of Hormuz over the past few days, even before the US said it would reimpose a blockade of Iranian ports as hostilities escalated.

title: Phillippine Peso Approaches Record Low as Oil Prices Advance
title_cn: 随着油价上涨，菲律宾比索逼近历史新低
summary: The Philippine peso falls toward a record low as escalating tensions in the Middle East drove oil prices higher, putting renewed pressure on the currency.

title: Leveraged Chip Bets Backfire in Korea as Biggest ETF Falls 45%
title_cn: 韩国杠杆筹码押注适得其反，最大 ETF 下跌 45%
summary: A new breed of leveraged products tracking major South Korean chip stocks are tumbling in value, threatening steep losses for the country’s retail investors who favor the tools to pursue amplified returns.

title: Yuan Still Cheap Versus Euro Even After Gain, Deutsche Bank Says
title_cn: 德意志银行表示，即使在上涨之后，人民币兑欧元仍然便宜
summary: China’s yuan is still undervalued versus the euro despite its recent gains, and that’s contributing to a wider European Union trade deficit, according to Deutsche Bank AG.

title: Brent Tops $85, Stocks Dip as Rate-Hike Bets Build: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 布伦特原油价格突破 85 美元，股市因加息押注而下跌：市场结束
summary: Oil advanced for a second day and Asian stocks fell as the standoff between the US and Iran intensified, reigniting inflation concerns and boosting bets for an interest-rate hike.

title: China’s Crude Oil Imports Plunge to Lowest in Nearly a Decade
title_cn: 中国原油进口量跌至近十年来最低水平
summary: Chinese crude oil imports fell sharply in June to near a decade low, hampered by war in the Persian Gulf and an abrupt slowdown in domestic demand.

title: Taiwan Fund Profits 80% After Intervening to Blunt Trump Tariffs
title_cn: 干预特朗普关税后，台湾基金获利 80%
summary: Taiwan reported a roughly 80% profit from a nine-month-long intervention to support the island’s stock market following the Trump administration’s move to impose tariffs, though it has now exited its position.

title: US Hits Iran With Strikes, Blockade as Trump Plans Hormuz Charge
title_cn: 特朗普计划冲锋霍尔木兹，美国对伊朗进行打击和封锁
summary: President Donald Trump reinstated the US blockade of Iranian ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz and demanded a 20% reimbursement for all other cargo shipped through the waterway.

title: SK Hynix Selloff Deepens in Seoul After Wall Street Memory Slump
title_cn: 华尔街记忆力低迷后，SK海力士在首尔的抛售加剧
summary: SK Hynix Inc. shares fell in Seoul after a rout on Wall Street, reflecting heightened caution among investors following this year’s unprecedented rally in global chipmaker stocks.

title: Oil Tops $85 a Barrel as Trump Reinstates Naval Blockade on Iran
title_cn: 特朗普恢复对伊朗的海军封锁，油价升至每桶 85 美元
summary: Brent oil rose above $85 a barrel for the first time in a month, as US President Donald Trump reimposed a blockade on Iranian ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz and demanded payment for all other cargo.

title: SocGen Sees $76 Billion of JGB Buying If GPIF Rebalances Assets
title_cn: 如果 GPIF 重新平衡资产，法国兴业银行预计日本国债将购买 760 亿美元
summary: Japan’s Government Pension Investment Fund has room to buy as much as ¥12.3 trillion ($76 billion) of additional government bonds without changing its asset allocation mix, according to Societe Generale SA, offering potential support for the debt market.

title: Gold Holds Drop as Mideast Risks, Waller Remarks Boost Headwinds
title_cn: 中东风险导致黄金持有量下跌，沃勒言论加剧阻力
summary: Gold held a decline as escalating hostilities in the Middle East drove a surge in energy costs, and a US monetary policymaker raised the likelihood of interest-rate hikes to rein in stubborn inflation.

title: China Airline Shares Face More Profit Pain as Demand Stays Weak
title_cn: 由于需求持续疲软，华航股价面临更多利润损失
summary: Shares of China’s major airlines are lagging Cathay Pacific Airways Ltd. by nearly 50 percentage points this year, as analysts expect weaker profits to persist on lackluster domestic travel demand.

title: What to Know About Shein's Plans for Mega HK IPO
title_cn: 关于 Shein 大型香港 IPO 计划的了解
summary: Fast-fashion giant Shein is seeking to list in Hong Kong as soon as August, targeting to raise about $2 billion to $3 billion, sources say. Minmin Low reports on the company's fundamentals. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed Rate-Hike Bets Mount Before Inflation Data, Warsh Testimony
title_cn: 沃什的证词显示，在通胀数据公布之前，美联储加息的赌注就增加了
summary: Bond traders ramped up bets for a July interest-rate hike ahead of US inflation data and an appearance by the head of the Federal Reserve that stand to reinforce the need for action.

title: Seidler Equity Is Looking to Sell Stake in 139-Year-Old Baseball Gear Maker Rawlings
title_cn: Seidler Equity 正在寻求出售拥有 139 年历史的棒球装备制造商 Rawlings 的股份
summary: The private equity owner of Rawlings Sporting Goods Co., one of the oldest makers of baseball apparel and equipment, is exploring the sale of its stake in the company in an effort to tap booming investor demand for sports-related investments.

title: Brazil’s Oncoclinicas Said to File for Out-of-Court Debt Rework
title_cn: 巴西 Oncoclinica 据称将申请庭外债务重整
summary: Oncoclinicas do Brasil Servicos Medicos SA is preparing to file for an out-of-court debt restructuring, which could come as soon as Monday night, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Shein’s Slowing Growth Risks Weighing on Hong Kong IPO Valuation
title_cn: Shein 增长放缓风险打压香港 IPO 估值
summary: Shein has finally won long-awaited Chinese regulatory approval for its planned Hong Kong listing, but slowing business growth threatens to weigh on the valuation it can command in the initial public offering.

title: India’s Beaten-Down Large Caps Set to Rebound on Foreign Flows
title_cn: 印度遭受重挫的大盘股将因外资流入而反弹
summary: India’s large-cap stocks are set to narrow their underperformance to smaller peers, supported by the return of foreign investors, an improving earnings outlook and attractive valuations, according to strategists.

title: Wells Fargo’s Mike Mayo: Citi My Top Pick of Big Banks
title_cn: 富国银行的迈克·梅奥：花旗银行是我的首选大银行
summary: Investors are preparing for a significant earnings week as five of the six largest US banks, including JPMorgan, Citi, Wells Fargo, Bank of America, and Goldman Sachs, are scheduled to report their quarterly results within a few hours of each other. Mike Mayo, Head of US Large-Cap Bank Research at Wells Fargo, joined the program to share his outlook. He expects overall bank earnings to increase by 15 to 20 percent year-over-year, driven by a combination of strong Wall Street trading revenues and robust commercial loan growth on Main Street. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: After Biden Denied Alabama Coal Waste Bid, Trump Reverses Course
title_cn: 拜登拒绝阿拉巴马州煤炭废物投标后，特朗普改变路线
summary: The Environmental Protection Agency on Monday proposed to approve Alabama’s application to take over issuing certain coal waste permits from the agency, part of a trend under President Donald Trump to transfer more authority from the federal government to states.

title: First Public Fusion Firm Jumps in Wall Street Trading Debut
title_cn: 第一家上市融合公司在华尔街首次亮相
summary: General Fusion Group Ltd. surged in its first day of trading after merging with a blank-check firm, a sign of investors’ interest in the world’s first publicly listed nuclear fusion company.

title: Russian Billionaire Wins Fight to Boot Manager of Biotech Fund
title_cn: 俄罗斯亿万富翁赢得了生物技术基金经理的争夺
summary: Russian billionaire Dmitry Rybolovlev’s family trust prevailed in its effort to remove the manager of a bankrupt $2.5 billion venture capital fund it backed.

title: Oil Surges as Trump Says US Wants 20% Charge for Hormuz Flows
title_cn: 特朗普表示美国希望对霍尔木兹流量收取 20% 的费用，油价飙升
summary: Oil surged by the most since April after US President Donald Trump said he would reimpose a blockade on Iranian ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz and demand payment for all other cargo moving through the waterway, dashing hopes for a near-term recovery in shipping flows.

title: 【今朝の5本】仕事を始める前に読んでおきたい厳選ニュース
title_cn: 【今早5篇】精选上班前必读新闻
summary: ホルムズ通航に20％の対価要求、近く利上げ必要に、ウォール街決算、独VWが5万人削減、円に弱気

title: Argentina IPO Pipeline Grows as YPF Power Unit Files For US Listing
title_cn: YPF 电力公司申请美国上市，阿根廷 IPO 项目不断增加
summary: The power-generation unit of Argentina’s state-run energy firm YPF SA has filed for a US initial public offering, joining a growing pipeline of Argentine companies seeking New York listings.

title: Afore Banamex Chief Investment Officer Acosta to Leave Firm
title_cn: Afore Banamex 首席投资官阿科斯塔将离职
summary: The chief investment officer of Mexican pension fund Afore Banamex, Tomas Acosta, is leaving the firm, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: SoftBank’s Masayoshi Son Sees Fusion Power as Key to AI’s Future
title_cn: 软银的孙正义将聚变能力视为人工智能未来的关键
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. founder Masayoshi Son said that in the not-so-distant future, nuclear fusion technology will offer the most realistic solution for powering AI data centers’ ballooning needs.

title: South Korea Turns More Bullish on Economy as Chip Boom Rolls On
title_cn: 随着芯片热潮的发展，韩国对经济更加看好
summary: South Korea’s government is taking a more bullish view of the economy than the International Monetary Fund’s recent assessment, maintaining that an artificial intelligence-driven semiconductor boom will continue to outweigh the impact of the Middle East conflict.

title: OpenAI’s Feud With xAI Carries On as Apple Secrets Fight Revs Up
title_cn: 苹果秘密之争愈演愈烈，OpenAI 与 xAI 的争斗仍在继续
summary: OpenAI asked a judge to find that a lawsuit filed by xAI Corp. accusing the ChatGPT maker of trade secret theft “should never have been filed” and seeks to recoup more than $1 million in legal expenses from Elon Musk’s company.

title: Huawei's $11 Billion Clean Energy Empire Is Opening New Markets
title_cn: 华为110亿美元的清洁能源帝国正在开拓新市场
summary: Best known for telecoms infrastructure, the Chinese powerhouse has quietly become part of the backbone of the global energy transition.

title: Stocks & Bonds Fall as Oil Jump Fuels Fed-Hike Bets | The Close 7/13/2026
title_cn: 油价上涨助长美联储加息押注，股票和债券下跌收盘价 7/13/2026
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Russel Investments President & CIO Kate El-Hillow, Chipotle CEO Scott Boatwright, Michaels CEO David Boone, UBS Alignment Partners Wealth Management Managing Director Alli McCartney, D.A. Davidson Technology Research Head Gil Luria, New Mountain Capital Founder & CEO Steve Klinsky, & Wells Fargo US Large-Cap Bank Research Head Mike Mayo. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lonsdale Suggests Forgoing Patents to Avoid China Taking IP
title_cn: 朗斯代尔建议放弃专利以避免中国获取知识产权
summary: China is actively appropriating intellectual property developed by US-based artificial intelligence and life-science startups, 8VC founder Joe Lonsdale told Bloomberg TV Monday.

title: New Mountain Capital CEO: AI SaaSpocalypse Is Overstated
title_cn: 新山资本CEO：AI SaaS末日被言过其实
summary: Steve Klinsky, Founder and CEO of New Mountain Capital, discussed the current state of private markets. He noted that recent redemption requests were primarily from retail investors in credit funds, which did not significantly impact institutional investor appetite. Klinsky highlighted that smarter institutional investors are increasingly moving into credit to capitalize on lower prices. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI-Fueled Rally to Continue Into 2027, Analyst Luria Says
title_cn: 分析师 Luria 表示，人工智能推动的涨势将持续到 2027 年
summary: Gil Luria, D.A. Davidson technology and research head, says the fundamentals are still looking good for semiconductor and AI-related stocks. He speaks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dyson’s New $100 Portable Fan Is Beating the Heat — and Sales Expectations
title_cn: 戴森 100 美元的新款便携式风扇正在消暑——和销售预期
summary: The newest status symbol on the streets of Manhattan is a high-tech portable fan that’s been hard to get hold of.

title: Palantir Co-Founder Joe Lonsdale on the AI Investment Boom
title_cn: Palantir 联合创始人 Joe Lonsdale 谈人工智能投资热潮
summary: AI is fueling a new era of venture investing. Joe Lonsdale, managing partner at 8VC and co-founder of Palantir, discusses the firm's record $1.5 billion fund, why startup rounds are getting bigger, and where he's placing his bets on the next generation of defense tech and AI companies. He joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Apple’s Lawsuit Could Disrupt OpenAI’s Bid to Rival the iPhone
title_cn: 苹果的诉讼如何扰乱 OpenAI 与 iPhone 竞争的竞争
summary: Apple's lawsuit accusing OpenAI of systematically stealing its intellectual property threatens to disrupt the AI company’s device ambitions long before the case is resolved. Bloomberg's Mark Gurman joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Selloff, Apple vs. OpenAI & the Future of Defense Tech | Bloomberg Tech 7/13/2026
title_cn: AI 抛售、苹果与 OpenAI 以及国防技术的未来 |彭博科技 2026 年 7 月 13 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down why an AI-fueled stock rout in South Korea spilled over into the US market Monday, sending SK Hynix ADRs falling in their second US trading day. Plus, Apple and OpenAI's AI rivalry enters the courtroom, with Apple filing a sweeping trade secrets lawsuit against the ChatGPT maker. And, FCC Chairman Brendan Carr joins to talk regulating space, and Palantir co-founder and 8VC managing partner Joe Lonsdale sits down with Ed to discuss his outlook for the defense tech sector. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sunrun Offers Solar Users Hundreds Per Month in Compute Program
title_cn: Sunrun 为太阳能用户提供每月数百美元的计算计划
summary: Sunrun Inc. is piloting a program aimed at enabling customers to earn hundreds of dollars per month that would use electricity from rooftop solar and battery installations to power home-computing systems for AI, according to Chief Executive Officer Mary Powell.

title: SK Hynix ADRs Tumble in Second Trading Day After Korea Selloff
title_cn: 韩国抛售后，SK 海力士 ADR 在第二个交易日暴跌
summary:
An AI-fueled stock rout in South Korea spilled over into the US market Monday, as SK Hynix Inc. American depositary shares fell as much as 9.3%, underscoring growing investor concerns that the boom is overextended.

The decline brought ADRs to trade just a few dollars above the $149 level where they priced last week ahead of their trading debut. Memory and storage peers in US dropped across the board, with Micron Technology Inc., Sandisk Corp., and Western Digital Corp. shares all falling more than 6%. The slump came after shares of SK Hynix plunged a record 15% in South Korea, sending the benchmark Kospi index down 9% and triggering a market-wide trading suspension.

For more, we speak with Mandeep Singh, Global Head of Tech Research for Bloomberg Intelligence. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Carr Accuses Disney of Being 'Disingenuous' of FCC Inquiries
title_cn: 卡尔指责迪士尼在 FCC 调查中“不诚实”
summary: FCC Chairman Brendan Carr calls Walt Disney Co. "disingenuous" regarding the probe into the company's diversity and inclusion practices. He speaks on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FCC Cut Satellite Approval Backlog in Half, Carr Says
title_cn: 卡尔表示，FCC 将积压的卫星审批数量减少了一半
summary: The Federal Communications Commission has reduced the backlog of satellite application approvals by half as it broadly seeks to stimulate the space and communications economy, Chairman Brendan Carr said in an interview on Bloomberg TV.

title: Germany’s Smag Sinks in Debut as Defense Stock Appetite Ebbs
title_cn: 由于国防股需求下降，德国 Smag 首次亮相就下跌
summary: Smag Mobile Antenna Masts AG shares tumbled 42% below the initial public offering price in their German trading debut, marking the latest sign of waning demand for defense stocks in Europe.

title: More Than 200 Experts Urge Action to Steer AI for Society’s Good
title_cn: 200 多位专家敦促采取行动引导人工智能造福社会
summary: A group of top economists and artificial intelligence researchers called for more study of the technology’s likely impact, saying it may become “radically more powerful” over the next decade and needs to be steered in a human-friendly direction.

title: FCC's Carr on Approval Times, Paramount-Warner Deal and Disney
title_cn: FCC 的卡尔谈审批时间、派拉蒙-华纳交易和迪士尼
summary: FCC Chairman Brendan Carr discusses the need to speed up approval times for spectrum and orbital data centers. He also talks about Paramount Skydance trying to buy Warner Bros. Discovery and the importance of broadcasters acting in the public interest. He speaks on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lazard's Bilicic Sees 'Tremendous' Demand for AI Data Center Power
title_cn: Lazard 的 Bilicic 看到人工智能数据中心电力的“巨大”需求
summary: George Bilicic, Lazard's global head of power, energy and infrastructure, says we're a long way from solving the issue of energy demand for AI data center power and expects upward pressure on gas prices. He speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sunrun's Experiment to Turn Homes Into AI Hubs
title_cn: Sunrun 将家庭变成人工智能中心的实验
summary: Sunrun CEO Mary Powell joins Open Interest to explain how the company plans to transform homes with solar and batteries into AI computing hubs. She says homeowners could earn hundreds of dollars a month by hosting AI compute nodes while helping meet soaring demand for AI infrastructure. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: General Fusion Soars After Nasdaq Debut
title_cn: General Fusion 纳斯达克上市后股价飙升
summary: General Fusion CEO Greg Twinney joins Open Interest after the company's Nasdaq debut, explaining why going public accelerates its fusion roadmap, how fusion could power AI data centers, and why he believes the company's mechanical approach can outperform rival technologies in the global race for commercial fusion energy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Gas-Power Costs at 17-Year High and Climbing, Lazard Says
title_cn: Lazard 称美国天然气发电成本创 17 年来新高且仍在攀升
summary: The cost of power from natural gas-fired plants in the US hit the highest level in at least 17 years, and is poised to climb even higher as demand surges from new data centers.

title: AI Chip Giants TSMC and SK Hynix Pull in Different Directions
title_cn: AI芯片巨头台积电和SK海力士分道扬镳
summary:
TSMC soared while SK Hynix tumbled — why are are the two essential AI chip firms pulling in different directions?

Tom Mackenzie explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Intel Invests €5 Billion to Expand Irish Hub in AI Chip Race
title_cn: 英特尔投资 50 亿欧元扩建爱尔兰人工智能芯片竞赛中心
summary: Intel Corp. is spending €5 billion ($5.7 billion) to expand its plant in Ireland, as the chipmaker attempts to regain its manufacturing dominance for the AI boom.

title: Apple’s $650 Billion Rally Fueled by Traders Fleeing AI Selloff
title_cn: 交易员逃离人工智能抛售推动苹果股价上涨 6500 亿美元
summary: Investors are flocking back to Apple Inc. as nervousness about artificial intelligence spending weighs on the stocks of chipmakers and cloud-computing giants.

title: SK Hynix Selloff Is Not a Huge Problem, Kunst Says
title_cn: Kunst表示，SK海力士抛售并不是一个大问题
summary: Sarah Kunst, founder and general of Cleo Capital, says the selloff in SK Hynix shares and South Korean stocks is not a problem. Kunst points out that SK Hynix has gained more than 500% over the past year. She speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple’s Lawsuit Threatens to Disrupt OpenAI’s Bid to Rival the iPhone
title_cn: 苹果的诉讼可能会扰乱 OpenAI 与 iPhone 竞争的努力
summary: Apple Inc.’s lawsuit accusing OpenAI of systematically stealing its intellectual property threatens to disrupt the AI company’s device ambitions long before the case is resolved.

title: ChatGPT’s Upgraded Voice Mode Captures the Imperfections of Real Conversations
title_cn: ChatGPT 升级语音模式捕捉真实对话的不完美之处
summary: The OpenAI chatbot now speaks and converses a lot more like a real person

title: Australia Curbs Rights of China Investors in Rare-Earths Miner
title_cn: 澳大利亚限制中国投资者对稀土矿商的权利
summary: Australia’s government has moved to block three China-linked shareholders of rare earths miner Northern Minerals Ltd. from voting or exercising other rights after they defied earlier orders to sell their stock.

title: Judge Rules Trump IRS Immunity Deal Has No ‘Basis in Law’
title_cn: 法官裁定特朗普国税局豁免协议没有“法律依据”
summary: A judge ruled that President Donald Trump’s lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service was a “bad faith” attempt to manipulate the judicial process and barred him and his administration from citing its supposed settlement in any future regulatory or judicial proceedings.

title: Venezuela Names Its US Ambassador as Head of Foreign Policy, Trade
title_cn: 委内瑞拉任命美国大使为外交政策和贸易主管
summary: Venezuela’s Acting President Delcy Rodríguez merged the government’s foreign policy and international trade ministries into a single office headed by Caracas’s ambassador to the US, Félix Plasencia.

title: Brazil Judge Bars Flavio Bolsonaro From Visiting Father for 90 Days
title_cn: 巴西法官禁止弗拉维奥·博索纳罗 90 天内探望父亲
summary: A Brazilian Supreme Court justice barred presidential candidate Flávio Bolsonaro from visiting his father, former leader Jair Bolsonaro, for 90 days, effectively preventing any visits until after the first round of October’s election.

title: Trump Says US is Reinstating Blockade Against Iran | Balance of Power: Late Edition 07/13/2026
title_cn: 特朗普表示美国将恢复对伊朗的封锁权力平衡：最新版 07/13/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Republican Senator Alan Armstrong of Oklahoma says he would support the Russia sanctions bill championed by the late Senator Lindsey Graham, saying it is in the US interest to support Ukraine and not leave the country "unsupported" in its war with Russia. Kevin Book, Managing Director at ClearView Energy Partners, says oil prices are headed higher as renewed US strikes against Iran raise fresh risks around flows through the Strait of Hormuz. Heather Conley, Resident Senior Fellow at the American Enterprise Institute, warns the renewal of US strikes against Iran could further strain US munitions stockpiles and air-defense capabilities. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ICE Fatally Shoots Man in Maine as Agency Scrutiny Mounts
title_cn: 随着机构审查的加强，ICE 在缅因州射杀一名男子
summary: A US immigration officer shot and killed a person in Maine on Monday morning, the second fatal shooting involving federal agents in less than a week.

title: Reeves to Use Last City of London Outing to Warn on Government Spending
title_cn: 里夫斯利用最后一次伦敦金融城郊游来警告政府支出
summary: Rachel Reeves will issue a coded warning to the next Labour government by telling a City of London audience on Tuesday night that plans to boost the economy will only succeed with the support of financial markets.

title: Graham’s Sister Appointed to US Senate Days After His Death
title_cn: 格雷厄姆去世几天后，他的妹妹被任命为美国参议员
summary: South Carolina Governor Henry McMaster picked Darline Graham Nordone to complete the remainder of the late Senator Lindsey Graham’s term, which expires in January.

title: Trump to Back Graham’s Russia Sanctions Bill, White House Says
title_cn: 白宫称特朗普支持格雷厄姆的俄罗斯制裁法案
summary: President Donald Trump plans to support a Russia sanctions bill championed by the late Senator Lindsey Graham, according to a White House official, a move that would intensify pressure on the Kremlin to end its war in Ukraine.

title: Conley: Iran Conflict Risks Stretching US Defenses
title_cn: 康利：伊朗冲突可能会削弱美国的防御能力
summary: Heather Conley, Resident Senior Fellow at the American Enterprise Institute, warns the renewal of US strikes against Iran could further strain US munitions stockpiles and air-defense capabilities. Conley notes the US and its allies are already stretched across the Gulf, Ukraine and the Indo-Pacific, and that a Russia sanctions bill championed by the late Senator Lindsey Graham would have a "big effect" if put into place. She speaks with Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Book Sees Oil Risk If Iran Conflict Broadens
title_cn: 书中指出，如果伊朗冲突扩大，石油将面临风险
summary: Kevin Book, Managing Director at ClearView Energy Partners, says oil prices are headed higher as renewed US strikes against Iran raise fresh risks around flows through the Strait of Hormuz. He says a move back toward $120 a barrel would likely require a broader escalation, including damage to civilian infrastructure or regional production. Book also discusses potential Russia sanctions and their impact on energy markets. He speaks with Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sen. Armstrong Backs Graham Russia Sanctions Push
title_cn: 参议员阿姆斯特朗支持格雷厄姆推动俄罗斯制裁
summary: Republican Senator Alan Armstrong of Oklahoma says he would support the Russia sanctions bill championed by the late Senator Lindsey Graham, saying it is in the US interest to support Ukraine and not leave the country "unsupported" in its war with Russia. Sen. Armstrong,  former CEO of oil and gas company Williams, also discusses the impact of renewed US strikes against Iran on energy markets. He notes that wind and solar should remain part of the US energy mix, so long as they can compete without subsidies. He speaks with Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New Zealand Business Confidence Recovered as Iran War Subsided
title_cn: 伊朗战争平息新西兰商业信心恢复
summary: New Zealand business confidence recovered in the second quarter as a tentative US-Iran peace deal helped push down fuel prices, a survey showed.

title: Trump Says US Will End Up Controlling Strait of Hormuz
title_cn: 特朗普称美国最终将控制霍尔木兹海峡
summary: The US is "taking out" all of Iran’s capability that has anything to do with the Strait of Hormuz and will "end up just controlling the whole thing" in the end, President Donald Trump says in the Oval Office. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Hynix Slumps in US Market, Oil Prices Soar amid Iran War | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 7/13/2026
title_cn: SK海力士美国市场暴跌，伊朗战争油价飙升彭博商业周刊日报 7/13/2026
summary: Today, Bloomberg US Semiconductor Reporter Ian King on SK Hynix's tumble in the markets in only its second day of US trading. Then, Julie Biel from Kayne Anderson Rudnick breaks down how latest fighting between the US and Iran is impacting the markets, oil prices, and interest rates. Plus Jennifer Rie, Bloomberg Intelligence Senior Litigation Analyst for Antitrust, explains the state lawsuits levied against the Paramount-Warner Bros deal. And, EY Americans Vice Chair Mitch Berlin gives his midyear outlook for M&A and dealmaking. Finally, Rodger Crandall of MassMutual joins the show to discuss what he's seeing in the market and why he believes customers are "cautiously optimistic." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s Hormuz Demand Implies Fee of $30 Million Per Supertanker
title_cn: 特朗普的霍尔木兹需求意味着每艘超级油轮的费用为 3000 万美元
summary: President Donald Trump just threw out a demand of a 20% reimbursement on cargo shipped through the Strait of Hormuz, or roughly $30 million on full supertankers carrying oil.

title: Lindsey Graham’s Death Creates Rare Political Scenario That’s Gripping DC
title_cn: 林赛·格雷厄姆的去世创造了令人震惊的华盛顿罕见的政治场景
summary: The thin majority that Republicans have in Congress is complicating things.

title: 1,000 Days of War and Upheaval That Reshaped the Middle East
title_cn: 重塑中东的 1,000 天战争和动乱
summary: From the ashes of October 7 to a direct US-Iran war, almost three years of chaos have fractured regional diplomacy.

title: Stocks in the Red Amid Geopolitical Uncertainty | Closing Bell
title_cn: 地缘政治不确定性导致股市下跌结束钟声
summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Global Deals Top $2.6 Trillion in First Half of Year
title_cn: 上半年全球交易额突破 2.6 万亿美元
summary: Global transaction values were up around 30% year over year to $2.6 trillion in the first half, according to data compiled by Bloomberg. Bloomberg's Ryan Gould says "we're in the midst of a Trump-induced M&A boom." He speaks along with EY-Parthenon, EY Americas Vice Chair Mitch Berlin, on "Bloomberg Businessweek." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: DHS to Move Ahead With New Jersey Warehouse Immigration Jail
title_cn: 国土安全部将推进新泽西仓库移民监狱建设
summary: The Department of Homeland Security is planning to turn a New Jersey warehouse into a massive immigration jail after all, reversing an earlier plan to sell the facility.

title: Trump Administration Targets ICC After Judges File Complaint
title_cn: 法官提出申诉后，特朗普政府将目标瞄准国际刑事法院
summary: The Trump administration announced a “whole-of-government” campaign against the International Criminal Court on Monday, after some judges filed a lawsuit alleging the US was punishing and pressuring them over past legal decisions.

title: US, Iran Trade Strikes as DC Mourns Graham | Balance of Power 7/13/2026
title_cn: 华盛顿哀悼格雷厄姆，美国和伊朗发起贸易打击权力平衡 7/13/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discusses the latest from DC. On today's show, Hudson Institute Senior Fellow Rebeccah Heinrichs, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino and Chairman of Advancing American Freedom and Former Director of Legislative Affairs at the White House Marc Short (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Burnham Says Cabinet Picks Will Reflect ‘Broad Church’ of Ideas
title_cn: 伯纳姆表示内阁的选择将反映“广泛教会”的想法
summary: Andy Burnham’s picks for senior cabinet positions will reflect both experience and a broad church of ideas, he plans to tell colleagues in his first address to the parliamentary Labour Party.

title: European Powers Join Forces to Build Anti-Ballistic Systems
title_cn: 欧洲强国联手建立反弹道系统
summary: A coalition of European nations agreed to share research and industrial experience to build an anti-ballistic missile defense, moving away from its reliance on the US as Ukraine struggles against Russia’s onslaught.

title: Graham’s Death Sparks Republican Race: Here Are Potential Candidates
title_cn: 格雷厄姆之死引发共和党竞选：以下是潜在候选人
summary: The sudden death of South Carolina Senator Lindsey Graham unleashed jockeying among leading Republicans in the Palmetto State to run for his seat for a full six-year term.

title: ICE Renews Bid to Convert NJ Warehouse Into Holding Facility
title_cn: ICE 再次竞标将新泽西州仓库转变为控股设施
summary: The Trump administration is reconsidering plans to convert a New Jersey warehouse into an immigration detention facility, despite previously telling a federal court that the agency abandoned such efforts.

title: EU Fails to Adopt Russian Sanctions and Freeze Oil Price Cap
title_cn: 欧盟未能通过俄罗斯制裁并冻结石油价格上限
summary: The European Union failed to endorse a 21st sanctions package against Russia on Monday, putting the bloc at risk of undermining one of its key tools to restrict the Kremlin’s oil revenue.
